content:
Every developer and designer knows the drill: you’re building a feature in React or Vue, and you need a specific icon—say, a shopping cart or a subtle chevron.

You open 5 different tabs: Lucide, Heroicons, Phosphor, FontAwesome, and Tabler. You find an icon, copy the raw SVG, tweak the stroke width manually in code, convert it to a React TSX component, and realize the design language doesn't match the rest of your app.

We got tired of repeating this workflow on every project. So we built IconSearch.

What is IconSearch?

IconSearch is a lightning-fast, free icon discovery engine designed specifically for developers, designers, and creators.

Instead of jumping between isolated icon library websites, you can search over 355,000+ indexed open-source SVG icons across popular libraries in a single place.

Key Features:

•
Unified Search Across Top Libraries: Search through Lucide, Heroicons, Phosphor, Tabler, Radix, Feather, FontAwesome, Remix, Simple Icons, and more in real time.

•
Live SVG Customizer: Adjust stroke width, icon size, color, and padding with real-time visual preview before downloading.

•
Multi-Format Export: Export icons instantly in whatever format your project needs:

• Raw SVG & PNG

•
React TSX & Vue SFC components

• Tailwind CSS / HTML markup

• SVG Sprites & JSON metadata

•
Workspace Carts & Presets: Collect icons into custom packs and save your preferred design styles across sessions.

Try it Out

Whether you're building a side project, building a design system, or looking for open-source icons, try out the Icon Search Engine.

We’d love to hear your feedback! What icon sets or developer workflows would you like to see next? Drop a comment below! 🚀
